How it works

Simple procurement in four steps

Managed through WhatsApp. No account needed.

Procurement team available

1

Review active campaigns

Review active procurement campaigns and curated supply opportunities. Live pricing and allocation status.

No account needed
2

Send your enquiry

Tap any WhatsApp button. A pre-filled procurement enquiry opens — ready to send.

Coordination active
3

Confirm procurement

We issue a confirmed supply summary. Payment after confirmation, via Mobile Money or bank transfer.

Procurement confirmed on WhatsApp
4

Supply coordination

We coordinate supply and site delivery across Ghana. Progress updates on WhatsApp throughout.

Tracked on WhatsApp

Why Builders Choose Wima

A platform built for serious procurement

Five reasons builders across Ghana rely on Wima Deal Hub for their building materials procurement.

Procurement Support

Every enquiry is handled by a real procurement team member — not a bot. We coordinate sourcing, supplier negotiation, and delivery from start to site.

Active procurement teamWhatsApp-first

Supplier Coordination

Every supplier on Wima Deal Hub is vetted before they join the network. We coordinate directly with verified suppliers so you don’t have to.

Supplier verifiedDirect coordination

Bulk Buying Access

By aggregating demand across multiple builders, Wima Deal Hub negotiates group pricing that individual buyers cannot access alone.

Group buy activeBulk pricing available

WhatsApp Convenience

No new accounts. No complicated platforms. Tap any button and your procurement enquiry opens directly in WhatsApp — pre-written and ready to send.

No account neededPay on confirmation

Diaspora Procurement Assistance

Building in Ghana from London, New York, Toronto, or Hamburg? We coordinate your full materials procurement on the ground — sourcing, supplier management, and site delivery.

Delivery support activeInternational coordination
